base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dungeon_dwarves_cave — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Dwarves Cave — TNT acquisition + Nerrick NPC. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
